theme: When during the RTH session does NQ make its high-of-day / low-of-day?
method: For each RTH session (9:30-16:00 ET), record which hourly bucket the HOD and LOD were set in. Buckets are by the hour the new extreme was first reached.
key_finding: U-shaped distribution. The first 30 min and the last hour together account for ~55% of HOD and ~50% of LOD setting times. The midday (11:30-14:00) period accounts for only ~22-27%. HOD has a stronger 'last hour' bias (23.8%) than LOD (14.8%) — late-session rallies are more common than late-session capitulation.
